channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump order pushes glyphosate production; Roundup chemical hated by MAHA
item.description: Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s Make America Healthy Again movement is largely opposed to glyphosate.

item.title: 8 ways you may be squandering money in retirement
'Do not give away Diego Garcia': Trump attacks the UK over Chagos Islands deal, again
item.description: Trump told the U.K. not to "give away" the Chagos Islands, which is where a joint U.S.-U.K. military base is located.

item.title: Dueling PACs take center stage in midterm elections over AI regulation
item.description: Two groups with opposite missions and backing from different companies are making a New York congressional primary a central battleground.

item.title: U.S. says Tehran would be ‘very wise’ to make a deal as Russia, Iran hold naval drills
item.description: It comes shortly after Vice President JD Vance accused Iran of failing to address core U.S. demands during nuclear talks in Geneva, Switzerland.

item.title: Why India joining this U.S.-led tech alliance could help supply chains
item.description: India is joining the U.S.-led Pax Silica initiative, giving Washington its biggest win yet in the race to shape and influence who has access to advanc...

item.title: You can invest in SpaceX before its IPO — but should you?
What oil hitting $70 a barrel would signal about U.S.-Iran tensions
‘Magnificent Seven’ stocks rise — but hardly enough to reverse a brutal February
U.S. stocks are trailing the world. It could be the beginning of an epic shift.
